title: callitriche heterophylla
intro: Callitriche heterophylla, also known as water starwort or European water starwort, is a type of aquatic or semi-aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Callitriche heterophylla include reducing fever, relieving kidney stones and other urinary issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Callitriche heterophylla can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and can be used both internally and externally to harness its medicinal properties.
